children.heading: Housing Treatment for Certain Members Who Have a Spouse or Other Dependents.—
children.label: a Housing Treatment for Certain Members Who Have a Spouse or Other Dependents.—

children.heading: .—Housing treatment regulations
children.label: 1 .—Housing treatment regulations
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall prescribe regulations that permit a member of the armed forces described in paragraph (2) who is undergoing a permanent change of station within the United States to request the housing treatment described in subsection (b) during the covered relocation period of the member.

children.label: A
children.text: has a spouse who is gainfully employed or enrolled in a degree, certificate or license granting program at the beginning of the covered relocation period;

children.label: B
children.text: has one or more dependents attending an elementary or secondary school at the beginning of the covered relocation period;

children.label: C
children.text: has one or more dependents enrolled in the Exceptional Family Member Program; or

children.label: D
children.text: is caring for an immediate family member with a chronic or long-term illness at the beginning of the covered relocation period.

children.heading: .—Continuation of housing for the spouse and other dependents
children.label: 1 .—Continuation of housing for the spouse and other dependents
children.text: If a spouse or other dependent of a member whose request under subsection (a) is approved resides in Government-owned or Government-leased housing at the beginning of the covered relocation period, the spouse or other dependent may continue to reside in such housing during a period determined in accordance with the regulations prescribed pursuant to this section.

children.heading: .—Early housing eligibility
children.label: 2 .—Early housing eligibility
children.text: If a spouse or other dependent of a member whose request under subsection (a) is approved is eligible to reside in Government-owned or Government-leased housing following the member’s permanent change of station within the United States, the spouse or other dependent may commence residing in such housing at any time during the covered relocation period.

children.heading: .—Temporary use of government-owned or government-leased housing intended for members without a spouse or dependent
children.label: 3 .—Temporary use of government-owned or government-leased housing intended for members without a spouse or dependent
children.text: If a spouse or other dependent of a member relocates at a time different from the member in accordance with a request approved under subsection (a), the member may be assigned to Government-owned or Government-leased housing intended for the permanent housing of members without a spouse or dependent until the member’s detachment date or the spouse or other dependent’s arrival date, but only if such Government-owned or Government-leased housing is available without displacing a member without a spouse or dependent at such housing.

children.label: A
children.text: The area of the duty station to which the member is reassigned.

children.label: B
children.text: The area in which the spouse or other dependent resides, but only if the spouse or other dependent resides in that area when the member departs for the duty station to which the member is reassigned, and only for the period during which the spouse or other dependent resides in that area.

children.label: C
children.text: The area of the former duty station of the member, but only if that area is different from the area in which the spouse or other dependent resides.

children.heading: .—Rule of Construction Related to Certain Basic Allowance for Housing Payments
children.label: c .—Rule of Construction Related to Certain Basic Allowance for Housing Payments
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to limit the payment or the amount of basic allowance for housing payable under to a member whose request under subsection (a) is approved.section 403(d)(3)(A) of this title

children.heading: .—Housing Treatment Education
children.label: d .—Housing Treatment Education
children.text: The regulations prescribed pursuant to this section shall ensure the relocation assistance programs under include, as part of the assistance normally provided under such section, education about the housing treatment available under this section.section 1056 of title 10

children.label: i
children.text: begins 180 days before the date of the permanent change of station; and

children.label: ii
children.text: ends 180 days after the date of the permanent change of station.

children.label: B
children.text: The regulations prescribed pursuant to this section may provide for a shortening or lengthening of the covered relocation period of a member for purposes of this section.

children.heading: .—Dependent
children.label: 2 .—Dependent
children.text: The term “dependent” has the meaning given that term in .section 401 of this title

children.heading: .—Permanent change of station
children.label: 3 .—Permanent change of station
children.text: The term “permanent change of station” means a permanent change of station described in .section 452(b)(2) of this title
